subject: Hi Jeffrey!
body:
Hi Jeffrey!
How are you?

It's been so long since we've spoken that I thought I would write and say
hi.

I've read a few of things people have written about you, I can't believe how
awful people can be! I hope you're doing well despite it all. I think of you
often and always wish you the best.

I still have the same boyfriend in New York, he's actually bought a house
here where my mom and I are living ( :
I've stopped smoking  and also hardly ever drink anymore. I know you don't
touch any of those things and I've finally realized how wise that is ( :

I'm coming to New York again in the middle of March. It would be great to
see you if you're around.

Lots and lots of love

Juliette
body_html:
Hi Jeffrey!

How are you?

It's been so long since we've spoken that I thought I would write and say hi.

I've read a few of things people have written about you, I can't believe how awful people can be! I hope you're doing well despite it all. I think of you often and always wish you the best.

I still have the same boyfriend in New York, he's actually bought a house here where my mom and I are living ( :
I've stopped smoking  and also hardly ever drink anymore. I know you don't touch any of those things and I've finally realized how wise that is ( :

I'm coming to New York again in the middle of March. It would be great to see you if you're around.

Lots and lots of love

Juliette
